bundles.title: Workflow Machine State + Phase Contract Registration
bundles.goal: Add spec_verify state/events/transitions to the workflow machine (v6.0→6.1) and register the spec_verify phase contract entry so downstream template rendering can resolve the new step.

tasks.title: Add spec_verify state with spec_verified→spec_ready and revise_spec→spec_draft transitions in workflow-machine.ts
Retarget spec_validate's spec_validated edge from spec_ready to spec_verify
Bump workflowVersion from 6.0 to 6.1
Add spec_verified to workflowEventOrder between spec_validated and accept_spec
Add spec_verify entry to phase-contract.ts with requiredInputs, cliCommands, and producedOutputs per D9
Verify deriveTransitions and deriveAllowedEvents still validate with the new state
Write transition unit tests: spec_validated→spec_verify, spec_verified→spec_ready, revise_spec→spec_draft
Write phase-contract registry test confirming spec_verify entry and type check

bundles.title: Deterministic CLI: specflow-spec-verify
bundles.goal: Build the specflow-spec-verify CLI that resolves impacted baselines, parses delta clauses, greps for REMOVED ripple candidates, and emits structured JSON (schema v1).

tasks.title: Create src/lib/spec-verify.ts with proposal parser to extract Modified Capabilities list
Implement baseline path resolution: capability name → openspec/specs/<name>/spec.md
Implement missing-baseline and unparseable-baseline detection with structured error codes
Implement delta clause parser (SHALL/MUST lines + Scenario WHEN/THEN anchors)
Implement baseline clause parser with requirement-name normalisation
Implement pairing enumeration: delta clause × baseline clause alignment
Implement REMOVED-clause grep across all baseline specs bounded to ±3 context lines
Implement JSON report assembly with schema_version:1 and all documented fields
Create src/bin/specflow-spec-verify.ts thin runner with <CHANGE_ID> --json interface and exit codes
Write unit tests: empty-capabilities case returns reason:no_modified_capabilities
Write unit tests: single-capability happy path produces correct pairings
Write unit tests: REMOVED-ripple case produces ripple_candidates
Write unit tests: missing-baseline error exits non-zero
Write unit tests: unparseable-baseline error exits non-zero with parse_reason

bundles.title: design.md Accepted-Conflict Writer Helper
bundles.goal: Create a helper that appends or creates the Accepted Spec Conflicts table in design.md with the six-column schema (id, capability, delta_clause, baseline_clause, rationale, accepted_at).

tasks.title: Add appendAcceptedConflict function to src/lib/spec-verify.ts that creates design.md if missing and appends a table row
Implement monotonic AC-id generation (AC1, AC2, …) within a change
Ensure the writer only touches the ## Accepted Spec Conflicts section and never other sections
Write unit tests: create design.md from scratch with one accepted conflict row
Write unit tests: append to existing design.md preserving other sections

bundles.title: Command Body Template Update for spec_verify Step
bundles.goal: Extend specflow.md.tmpl with a new Step that drives the hybrid CLI+agent verify flow, surfaces conflicts via AskUserQuestion, writes accepted conflicts to design.md, and advances the run.

tasks.title: Insert new Step (between existing Step 8 Spec Validate and Step 9 Design Handoff) in specflow.md.tmpl
Add prose for CLI invocation: specflow-spec-verify <CHANGE_ID> --json
Add prose for blocking on missing_baseline / unparseable_baseline errors with revise_spec advance
Add prose for AskUserQuestion per conflict with four outcomes: fix delta, fix baseline, fix both, accept-as-is
Add prose for writing accepted conflicts to design.md via the writer helper
Add prose for advancing run with spec_verified (all resolved) or revise_spec (any fix chosen)
Renumber all trailing steps after the insertion
Regenerate global/commands/specflow.md from the updated template
Write golden-file test verifying generated specflow.md includes the verify step with literal CLI invocations

bundles.title: End-to-End Integration Tests
bundles.goal: Exercise the full spec_validate→spec_validated→spec_verify→spec_verified→spec_ready path and the revise_spec back-edge, confirming all components work together.

tasks.title: Create fixture change with delta specs that produce pairings and ripple candidates
Write integration test: validate_spec→spec_validated→spec_verify→spec_verified→spec_ready happy path
Write integration test: spec_verify→revise_spec→spec_draft back-edge path
Write integration test: accept-as-is produces design.md with correct six-column table and row count
Verify openspec validate still reports the change as valid:true
Verify full test suite is green with all new tests in place
